name: Vesper
description: <p>&#34;Thelma&#34; is the first solo exhibition of Austin-based photographer Yvonne Uwah. It documents her growing acquaintance with lifelong St. Johns resident Thelma Williams, known affectionately by friends and neighbors as Grandma Wisdom. The opening reception will serve as an opportunity to view the work and to hear the artist speak about her approach to portraiture. Doors will open at 2pm and a discussion between Yvonne Uwah and Jason Ikpatt will begin at 3pm.</p>

									Painted Dunes Golf Course, is a 2024 2x award-winning venue, having won “Best of the Border” from El Paso Times and “El Paso Inc Best of El Paso 2024.” Painted Dunes is a hidden gem in North El Paso, ideal for Southwest-inspired outdoor wedding ceremonies and receptions. name: Shirley Acres Wedding & Event Venue
description:
Posted on         Isaac (DJ Isaac Ent)      I am a wedding DJ that recently had the pleasure of being part of a wedding at Shirley Acres and I must say that this is truly one of the best venues that I have ever worked at. The staff is so helpful and I had the honor of working with Marissa! She is such an amazing coordinator! I am big on communication to ensure we are all on the same page and she exceeded my expectations in that category. We worked great together to ensure we carried out such an amazing wedding! I hope to visit this venue again!         Posted on         Gaby W      WOW!!! Is all we kept hearing from our guest about the property, ambiance and food. The Shirley acres team is well coordinated, attentive and literally an absolute delight. Throughout the entire process from tour, to planning to wedding day everyone from their team has been so warm, genuine and professional. Any question, request, want was always received with a we will
Make it happen, or find someone who
Can attitude. They are an absolute dream team to work with. Marissa was our coordinator and she did a fantastic job!!!!!!!!!! If something went wrong or was off -genuinely we wouldn’t know or  didn’t notice.that’s how locked in she was on our timeline and coordination details.  We got to be present and enjoy our celebration while
Marissa and our vendor team coordinated effortlessly and made all magic happen. We are thrilled beyond words and feel grateful to the entire Shirley Acres team for helping to make our wedding extra memorable!         Posted on         Yrene Molina      Everyone was incredibly kind and welcoming, and they were always there and available to solve any emergency that came up.

They were also excellent at suggesting great ideas and making sure all of our needs were met. Special thanks to Mr. Bob, Stacie, Allie, and Margaret, who created beautiful floral arrangements and Chef Jose prepared delicious Mexican food that our guests absolutely loved.

We were lucky to have amazing spring weather, and the garden and outdoor areas looked absolutely beautiful.

We truly enjoyed our experience at Shirley Acres and highly recommend it to anyone looking for a wonderful wedding venue.

💕Alex and Yrene💕         Posted on         Christine Cong      We just had our wedding here this past weekend, and we really could not have imagined a better venue for our day. Everything throughout the whole planning process with them was so seamless. They provide almost everything you need for a wedding and everything they provide is extremely high quality.

Firstly, the catering is INCREDIBLE. The chef does an amazing job with everything he makes; even at our tasting we were absolutely blown away. We got the prime rib and chicken breast option, and they were both so flavorful and moist. We also got the crab-stuffed mushroom and egg rolls as our appetizer, and we got SO much positive feedback from out guests about the stuffed mushrooms. All this to say that this is the best venue food I've ever had, and honestly it's better than many restaurants I've had. The cake was also incredible; the bakery that Shirley Acres partners with (called MEB cakes) has such fun and tasty flavors, and we showed them a photo of what we wanted on our cake and they executed it perfectly.
Secondly, the venue itself is so well-maintained. The courtyard was beautiful for our ceremony, and the Garden Room was so beautifully decorated. My (now) husband and I really wanted a venue that was comfortable and homey and not so industrial, and Shirley Acres really shines in that way. Their venue is also so thoughtful; everything from the bridal suite to the guest house was beautiful, clean, and includes everything you need. The guest house itself is such a huge plus towards the venue, it really helps a lot with logistics and is so convenient.
Thirdly, the flowers and the decor the day of was amazing. They really made my vision for the day come to life, and I was so happy with the results. The florist really knows what she's doing; I sent her a Pinterest board with my flower inspos, but honestly I didn't have a super strong vision for what I wanted the flowers to look like. For a majority of the centerpieces, we essentially said "We trust you, as long as the colors match our colors, we're good" and she really came through. She put together arrangements for our altar that were beautiful, and the centerpieces for the tables were all a little bit different which we loved. We also opted in to have her make our personal flowers (bouquets, corsages, boutonnieres) since the price was almost the same for what we were wanting from Costco or Sam's Club except we didn't have to worry about the flowers not matching.
The DJ was also great! He had called me about a week before the wedding to get more information on what kind of music we wanted and to confirm final details, and everything was executed seamlessly. We got so much positive feedback on the music selections!
Lastly and most importantly, our month-of coordinator was Ashley, and she was AMAZING!!! She truly made the month of so much lower stress for me and I'm very type A, so me being comfortable to fully hand the reins over to her is a testament to how good of a job she does. During our meeting, she was very detail-oriented and asked a lot of questions and got a really good idea of what we wanted for the day of. She also is extremely responsive to emails and overall was so easy to work with. She also reached out to all of our vendors for me and was able to coordinate with them the time they should arrive and all the details on that end. I truly did not have to worry about a single thing on my wedding day. Her and the Shirley Acres staff were so efficient, friendly, and overall wonderful. I truly don't have enough good things to say about her and the team.
Having our wedding at Shirley Acres was such a wonderful experience, I really couldn't imagine having it anywhere else. Throughout the majority of the wedding planning process, so many people were asking if I was stressed and my response was always "Not really, I feel like I should be more stressed" and that was thanks to Shirley Acres! Everything they do they do well and at a reasonable price. If you're considering having an event here, I really could not recommend a place more.         Posted on         C Siouxsie      One of my oldest friend's daughter was married her over the weekend and it was beautiful! Great outdoor and indoor spaces. The crew were efficient and very easy to work with. This is a great option for events of any type.         Posted on         paul lipinski      Great time. Great staff. Nice venue.
Basically absolutely no complaints.
Food was good too         Posted on         Sara Rahnemaei      My wedding was on May 2025.
It is a nice place and I love my wedding. Everything was perfect.
The only thing that wasn't really good was Allie's communications. She was Tribble. Her reason was to have family problems and some coordinators quit. Now I know WHY.
She did not respond to any text,call, or email to me,my FH or my FMI after we paid the full amount for the venue and you can imagine how stressful it was.
Basically I was my own coordinator.
On the day of the wedding, she did a good job but it didnt covered the most lake of coordinating.
Also, the flower lady missed up with my order 😕. She doesn't know how to perform her job on the first day and at the day of my wedding she did what ever design she likes, not what I ordered.
DJ was good, bartender was good, food was perfect.
I'm giving one star to get attention on CORDINATOR.            Google rating score: 4.8 of 5, based on 357 reviews

name: The Club at Garden Ridge
description: Reserve your elegant San Antonio wedding venue with the Club at Garden Ridge. Now booking weddings for 2024 to 2026. Schedule a tour today.

name: The Preserve at Canyon Lake
description: Wedding Venue located in the Texas Hill Country near Austin and San Antonio with amazing waterfront views in the ceremony Chapel and Ballroom.

name: Azle Deer Cove - Wedding/Event Venue
description: Azle Deer Cove - a stunning wedding and event venue at affordable prices. Plan your event to celebrate in our beautiful, private gardens. Call us today!

name: Fort Worth Country Memories
description: Your Dream Wedding Starts at Fort Worth Country Memories! One of the Best Budget Friendly Barn Wedding Venues in Fort Worth & Dallas/DFW, TX

name: Wrenwood Ranch
description: Escape to Wrenwood Ranch in Johnson City, Texas for romantic getaways, weddings, and pet-friendly cottages near Fredericksburg.  Book your stay.

name: Majestic Metro
description:
The bride who books her wedding here can truly be the star of the show. The 
architectural elegance of the Majestic Metro serves as a grand showcase for 
a wedding party.

name: Bluebird Cottage Wedding Venue & Event Center
Grand Gala Events | El Paso's 5-Star Venue
YOUR DAY PARTY HALL
description: Check out Your Day Party Hall in El Paso TX today! Call 915-777-3425 to ask about our party options. Our venue is located in a very convenient location at a great price. Great for kids parties, weddings, baby showers and more.

name: BRIK Venue
description: Your experience at BRIK will be unlike any other venue. Attentive service, unparalleled experiences, and exclusive amenities.

name: Behr House Bed and Breakfast
description:
Behr House Weddings



Where Timeless Hill Country Charm Meets Intimate Celebration





Imagine exchanging vows beneath the Pavilion with sunset views to the West and grand limestone walls rising in front of you. Green vines climbing up the massive stone fireplace outside, gardens lush with blooms, bistro lights twinkling after dark, and the property grounds becoming one inviting, memorable space.

name: Gardens at Old Town Helotes
description: Say “I do” at Gardens at Old Town. Indoor & outdoor spaces with Hill Country charm, flexible packages, and concierge support for stress-free planning.

name: The Gardenia Venue

name: Sanman Studios

name: Tuscany Halls
description: At Tuscany Halls, we’re all about making your celebration one to remember. Whether you’re planning a wedding, quinceañera, or any big life moment, we’ve got you covered with everything you need so you can enjoy the fun and skip the stress.

name: Busted Oak Cellars
description: Busted Oak Cellars begins and ends with family. It is saturated with vibrant memories of what it means for people to come together. We come back to this place to cherish our family and community and to remember what we love most about Texas. Our desire is we believe that a shared meal or a glass of wine can turn strangers into family. Our goal is to make every wedding special with great wedding planning services and catering to your exact needs.

name: The Historic Hill House and Farm
description: Choose our wedding venue north of Houston, for your big day and enjoy a host of bespoke amenities. Schedule your tour today and book your date!

name: Magnolia Terrace Wedding and Event Venue
Reflections Venue and Gardens
description: Reflections Venue & Gardens, is located in Plano, Texas  only one mile from Interstate I-75 and Spring Creek Parkway. The ballrooms feature vaulted ceilings adorned with crystal chandeliers. Chosen as the lead gardens for the Plano Garden Tour, Reflections Venue & Gardens  offers you a beautiful venue,  stunning views, and the exquisite cuisine. The elegant grand ballroom at Reflections comfortably seat up to 200 at round tables.

name: Vista West Ranch
description: Vista West Ranch is a unique blend of rustic, bohemian, chic. We've combined weathered wood, aged tin, stained concrete floors & willow sphere lighting to create the perfect recipe for a gorgeous Texas barn wedding. Romantic and memorable VWR is nestled deep in the Texas Hill Country just outside of Dripping Springs.

name: The Hall at Ridgestone
description: The Hall At Ridgestone was created with the purpose of providing a clean, sophisticated and affordable event venue to serve all of the Coastal Bend and surrounding areas. We understand the thought, preparation, and the countless hours it takes to create the perfect event. That’s why The Hall At Ridgestone has partnered with talented DJ’s, decorators, caterers, bakers, and event planners to offer our clients affordable event packages. Ideal for events from 50-200 guests, The Hall At Ridgestone is the perfect space to host your special event!

name: Old Bethany Weddings and Events
description:
Since we hosted our first ever wedding in the spring of 2018, we have now hosted over 300 weddings at our beautiful property. Our staff has over 15 years of combined experience in the wedding industry, and we are passionate about providing next-level customer service to our clients. 
Whether it’s your dream to get married outdoors by a gorgeous Texas oak tree, or inside with a wall of windows as your backdrop, we have great options for both intimate ceremonies and larger soirees. 

We are proud of being voted “Best Wedding Venue” in Waco for several years in a row, and we count it an honor that you would consider hosting your dream event at our venue.

name: Hollywood Hall

function showSubMenu(elem, id, event) {
    if (wdIsNavAnimating) {
        return false;
    }

    if (wdSubMenuTransparency > 0) {
        $('.submenuli').css('opacity', wdSubMenuTransparency);
    }

    if (document.getElementById('submenuContainer')) {
        $('#submenuContainer').append($('#dvChildMenu' + id));
    }
    else {
        $('#menuBar').after($('#dvChildMenu' + id));
    }

    var elems = $('#dvChildMenu' + id).find('a');
    var maxWidth = 0;

    for (var i = 0; i  maxWidth) {
            maxWidth = $(elems[i]).width()
        }
    }

    var submenuOffsetTop = 0;

    if (wdSubMenuDirection == 'up') {
        $('#dvChildMenu' + id).css('height', 'auto');
        submenuOffsetTop = $(elem.parentNode).offset().top - 6 - $('#dvChildMenu' + id).height();
    }
    else {
        submenuOffsetTop = $(elem.parentNode).offset().top + $(elem.parentNode).height() - 8;
    }

    $('#dvChildMenu' + id).css('left', $(elem).offset().left - 10 - $('body').offset().left + 'px');
    $('#dvChildMenu' + id).css('max-width', (maxWidth + 150).toString() + 'px');

    if (wdHeaderElementId != null) {
        var headHeight = $('#' + wdHeaderElementId).height();
        $('#dvChildMenu' + id).css('top', (wdSubMenuOffset + headHeight).toString() + 'px');
    }
    else {
        $('#dvChildMenu' + id).css('top', (wdSubMenuOffset + submenuOffsetTop).toString() + 'px');
    }

    $('#dvChildMenu' + id).css('height', 'auto');

    var elem = document.getElementById('dvChildMenu' + id).childNodes[0].childNodes[0];

    $('#dvSliderCorporate').on('mouseover', hideSubMenus);
    $('#dvPageContent').on('mouseover', hideSubMenus);
}

var wdHelpCtl = function ($scope, $http, $modal, $timeout, $data) {

        this.$close();
    };

    $scope.askAl = function () {
        $scope.close();

        omModalPopup = $modal.open({
            templateUrl: '../../Views_Angular/OnlineManager/AdminAskAl.html',
            controller: OnlineManagerAdminAskAl,
            backdrop: 'static'
        });
    }

    $timeout(function () {
        $('.modal-body').css({
            overflow: 'auto'
        });
        $('#dvHelpContents').html($scope.html);
    }, 250);
};

var askAIAction = 'new'
var askAIIsLoaded = false;
var askAIIsFirstContact = true;

var OnlineManagerAdminAskAl = function ($scope, $http, $timeout, $modal) {
    askAIIsLoaded = false;

    $scope.askAl = function () {
        // read the text and return output from Al.

        if ($('#txtbxAskAl').val() != '') {
            $('#dvAIResponse').append($('You' + $('#txtbxAskAl').val() + ''));
        }

        setTimeout(function () {
            const lastUserMessage = document.querySelector('.AILastResponse');
            if (lastUserMessage) {
                lastUserMessage.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
            }
        }, 250);

        $('#dvAIResponse').append($(''));

        fetch('/AskAl/GetOpenAIResponse', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'Content-Type': 'application/json'
            },
            body: JSON.stringify({ inputText: encodeURI($('#txtbxAskAl').val()), action: askAIAction, type: askAlType })
        })
            .then(response => response.json())
            .then(data => {
                // Handle the response
                $('#txtbxAskAl').val('');
                $('#dvAIThinking').remove();
                $('#dvAIResponse').append($('Al' + data.response.replace(/\n/g, '') + ''));

                setTimeout(function () {
                    const lastUserMessage = document.querySelector('.AILastResponse');
                    if (lastUserMessage) {
                        lastUserMessage.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
                        $('.AILastResponse').removeClass('AILastResponse');
                    }
                }, 250);
            })
            .catch(error => {
                console.error('Error:', error);
                $('#txtbxAskAl').val('');
                $('#dvAIThinking').remove();
                $('#dvAIResponse').append($('Error: ' + data.error + ''));

                setTimeout(function () {
                    const lastUserMessage = document.querySelector('.AILastResponse');
                    if (lastUserMessage) {
                        lastUserMessage.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
                        $('.AILastResponse').removeClass('AILastResponse');
                    }
                }, 250);
            });
    };

    $scope.close = function () {
        this.$close();
    };

    $timeout(function () {
        if (!askAIIsLoaded) {
            askAIIsLoaded = true;
            $scope.askAl();
        }
    }, 250);
}

function checkForEnterKey(event) {
    if (event.keyCode == 13) {
        $('#OnlineManagerAdminAskAl').scope().askAl();
    }
}

function hideWebsitePageEdit() {
    if ($('#iFrameEdit').length > 0) {
        var isChanged = document.getElementById("iFrameEdit").contentWindow.isEditChanged;
        if (isChanged) {
            wdFunctions.showConfirm('Changes Not Saved', 'Would you like to save your changes?', 'Close Without Saving', hideWebsitePageEditCancel, 'Save Changes', hideWebsitePageEditConfirm);
            return false;
        }
    }
    else {
        if (isEditChanged) {
            wdFunctions.showConfirm('Changes Not Saved', 'Would you like to save your changes?', 'Close Without Saving', hideWebsitePageEditCancel, 'Save Changes', hideWebsitePageEditConfirm);
            return false;
        }
    }

    $('#dvUnsaved').hide();
    $('#dvWebsitePagesEditor').html('');
    $('#dvEditorBackground').hide();
    $('#dvWebsitePagesEditor').hide();
    $('#dvWebsitePagesMaster').fadeIn();

    if ($('#wdcontent').length > 0) {
        $('#wdcontent').redactor('core.destroy');
        $('#dvPageContent').css({ top: '25px', padding: '20px' });
        $('#wdToolbar').remove();
        $('#dvUnsaved').remove();
        $('.redactor-toolbar-tooltip').remove();
        selectedEditArea = null;
        $('#dvPageContent').css('background-color', '');
    }
    else {
        $('#dvPageName').hide();
        $('#iFrameEdit').hide();
        $('#iFrameEdit')[0].src = '';
    }

    wdPageFunctions = new pageMethods();

    if (typeof (hideWebsitePageEditReturn) == 'function') {
        hideWebsitePageEditReturn();
    }
}

function hideWebsitePageEditCancel() {
    $('#dvUnsaved').hide();
    $('#dvWebsitePagesEditor').html('');
    $('#dvEditorBackground').hide();
    $('#dvWebsitePagesEditor').hide();
    $('#dvWebsitePagesMaster').fadeIn();

    if ($('#wdcontent').length > 0) {
        $('#wdcontent').redactor('core.destroy');
        $('#dvPageContent').css({ top: '25px', padding: '20px' });
        $('#wdToolbar').remove();
        $('#dvUnsaved').remove();
        $('.redactor-toolbar-tooltip').remove();
        selectedEditArea = null;
        $('#dvPageContent').css('background-color', '');
    }
    else {
        $('#dvPageName').hide();
        $('#iFrameEdit').hide();
        $('#iFrameEdit')[0].src = '';
    }

    if (typeof (hideWebsitePageEditReturn) == 'function') {
        hideWebsitePageEditReturn();
    }
}
